top_contributors.name: Southern California Pipe Trades District Council #16 PAC

campaign_promises: Raise wages for working families and strengthen local living-wage laws
Protect workers' rights and target companies engaged in wage theft
Build more affordable housing in the Harbor Area and citywide
Eliminate bureaucracy and bring commonsense solutions to homelessness
Coordinate mental health and addiction services with housing
Invest in emergency shelters, transitional housing, and permanent housing
Improve neighborhood safety through community partnerships
Advance the blue economy through AltaSea and related initiatives in San Pedro
Expand outdoor dining platforms and small-business support
Convert county buildings into shelters — e.g., 40-bed shelter project
Build responsive, efficient, and effective city government
